semantic.role: LLM prompt template generator for architectural violation fixes.
responsibilities: Defines the data structure (FixViolationContext) for violation context needed to generate a fix prompt.
Formats violation details and file context into a structured instructional prompt for an LLM assistant.
outOfScope: Directly fixing violations (only generates prompts for an LLM to do so)
Importing CLI entrypoints or service-level modules
invariants: Must export the FixViolationContext interface for type safety.
Must export the generateFixPrompt function as the primary public API.
Must remain decoupled from CLI entrypoints and service orchestration per engine-independence rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, type-safe prompt generation utility for automated architectural violation remediation via LLM.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of broader hardening of risk hotspots with LLM/DB decoupling; this module supports LLM-based fix generation.
